scripts.dev: echo '🚀 Starting frontend dev server on http://localhost:3000' && vite
scripts.build: echo '📦 Building frontend for production...' && vite build && echo '✅ Frontend build complete! Output: dist/'
scripts.start: echo '🌐 Starting production preview on http://localhost:4173' && vite preview
scripts.preview: echo '👀 Starting preview server...' && vite preview
scripts.lint:fix: echo '🔧 Fixing linting issues...' && eslint . --ext .ts,.tsx --fix && echo '✅ Linting complete!'
scripts.format: echo '✨ Formatting frontend code...' && prettier --write "src/**/*.{ts,tsx}" --log-level silent && echo '✅ Formatting complete!'
scripts.typecheck: echo '🔬 Type checking frontend...' && tsc --noEmit && echo '✅ Type check passed!'
scripts.test:watch: echo '👀 Running tests in watch mode...' && vitest
scripts.test:coverage: echo '📊 Running tests with coverage...' && vitest run --coverage && echo '✅ Coverage report: coverage/index.html'
scripts.test:ci: echo '🤖 Running tests (CI mode)...' && vitest run --coverage
scripts.test:ui: echo '🎨 Starting Vitest UI on http://localhost:51204' && vitest --ui
scripts.storybook: echo '📚 Starting Storybook on http://localhost:6006' && storybook dev -p 6006
scripts.storybook:build: echo '📦 Building Storybook...' && storybook build && echo '✅ Storybook built! Output: storybook-static/'
scripts.storybook:preview: echo '👀 Serving built Storybook on http://localhost:6007' && npx http-server storybook-static -p 6007
scripts.fix: echo '🔧 Auto-fixing frontend...' && yarn format && yarn lint:fix && echo '✅ Frontend auto-fix complete!'
